text: ……不太好。这里的灯光一直在伤害我。
column6: #texten:...Not good. The lights here have been hurting me all along.

text: 但现在灯几乎灭了。所以你没事。
column6: #texten:But now the lights are almost gone. So you're safe.

text: ……你是说，明亮的神殿反而在害你？
column6: #texten:...You mean the bright temple was actually harming you?

text: 这个星球的电能对我们有辐射。我在灯亮着的时候待了太久了。
column6: #texten:This planet's electric energy is toxic to us. I was in the lit areas too long.

text: 那我们快走。离开这里你会好起来的。
column6: #texten:Then let's go. You'll get better once we leave.

text: _99[k]r。走之前……前面还有最后一个区域。
column6: #texten:_99[k]r. Before we go... there's one last area ahead.

text: 这个神殿的核心……有什么东西在等着我们。
column6: #texten:Something in the temple's core... is waiting for us.
